src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 configuration with native SpringDoc OpenAPI 3 specification to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.human_impl: Removed @EnableSwagger2 and Docket beans; added OpenAPI bean using io.swagger.v3.oas.models classes.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 17.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Remove inheritance from deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / Java 17 ecosystem standards.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to standalone class.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated method chaining API with lambda-based DSL for HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Replaced '.csrf().disable()' and '.authorizeRequests()' with '.csrf(csrf -> ...)' and '.authorizeHttpRequests(authorize -> ...)' inside a SecurityFilterChain bean.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Update AuthenticationManager bean definition to use AuthenticationConfiguration instead of overriding protected methods.
Update request matcher syntax from antMatchers to requestMatchers to align with new Spring Security API.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Replaced '.antMatchers(...)' with '.requestMatchers(...)' inside the authorizeHttpRequests lambda.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server adapter with the new Spring Authorization Server configuration using SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Removed AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter and @EnableAuthorizationServer; added SecurityFilterChain bean with OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfiguration.applyDefaultSecurity.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy ClientDetailsServiceConfigurer with RegisteredClientRepository using the new OAuth2.1 model.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Replaced in-memory client configuration with RegisteredClient builder and InMemoryRegisteredClientRepository.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace static JWT signing key string with dynamic RSA key pair generation and JWK source.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Replaced JwtAccessTokenConverter with JWKSource<SecurityContext> bean generating RSA keys via KeyPairGenerator.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy TokenStore and JwtAccessTokenConverter with standard JwtDecoder bean.
Refactor Spring Security configuration from deprecated class-based inheritance to modern lambda DSL required for Spring Security 5.7+/6.x compatibility.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Removed extends ResourceServerConfigurerAdapter and @EnableResourceServer; replaced .authorizeRequests() with .authorizeHttpRequests() and chained lambda configurations.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Explicitly configure OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support to replace implicit configuration from removed ResourceServerConfigurerAdapter.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Added .oauth2ResourceServer(oauth2 -> oauth2.jwt(jwt -> { })) to the HttpSecurity chain.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.2.5 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17.
Replace the deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 autoconfigure with the native Spring Boot 3 OAuth2 Resource Server starter.
Add the Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server dependency required for Boot 3.x authorization flows.
Replace Springfox Swagger dependencies with Springdoc OpenAPI, which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Update Flyway core to version 10.7.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
